ksa_text: Implement platform monitoring and alerting systems for data availability, performance, cost optimization, and operational health, with defined escalation procedures and continuous performance measurement.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Data Architecture & Analytics is an edge domain for the Data and AI Transformation Lead, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.418) and conceptual alignment to include at the senior specialist level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Architecture & Analytics), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.418). External validation of this task KSA for the Data and AI Transformation Lead role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK, analytics maturity models (Gartner, Forrester), and analytics leadership surveys confirm data architecture and analytics competencies for senior roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Data Architecture & Analytics for the Data and AI Transformation Lead is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics task KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.418. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Data and AI Transformation Lead.
